scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/ha-client && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/ha-client && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
